options.content:
# NetVantage

Distributed Synthetic Monitoring & BGP Analysis Platform — v1.0.0

## Dashboards

### Monitoring

| Dashboard | Description |
|---|---|
| [Global Map](/d/netvantage-global-map/netvantage-global-map) | Geographic view of all POPs, color-coded by health status |
| [Ping Overview](/d/netvantage-ping-overview/netvantage-ping-overview) | ICMP RTT, packet loss, and jitter across all targets and POPs |
| [DNS Overview](/d/netvantage-dns-overview/netvantage-dns-overview) | DNS resolution times, response codes, resolver comparison |
| [HTTP Overview](/d/netvantage-http-overview/netvantage-http-overview) | HTTP timing breakdown, status codes, TLS cert expiry |
| [Traceroute Overview](/d/netvantage-traceroute-overview/netvantage-traceroute-overview) | Hop-by-hop latency, path changes, AS path tracking |
| [BGP Event Timeline](/d/netvantage-bgp-events/netvantage-bgp-events) | BGP hijack detection, RPKI validation, ROA monitoring, path correlation |

### Analysis

| Dashboard | Description |
|---|---|
| [Per-Target Drill-Down](/d/netvantage-target-drilldown/netvantage-target-drilldown) | All canary types combined for a single target, p50/p95/p99 across POPs |
| [POP Comparison](/d/netvantage-pop-comparison/netvantage-pop-comparison) | Side-by-side performance for the same target across different POPs |

### Operations

| Dashboard | Description |
|---|---|
| [Platform Health](/d/netvantage-platform-health/netvantage-platform-health) | Agent heartbeats, NATS consumer lag, API latency, processor throughput |
